title: Sleep Healing
description: Make sleep meaningful! A lightweight mod that adds health regeneration while resting in bed
body:
# Sleep Healing 
is a tiny but essential quality-of-life improvement for your Minecraft world. While vanilla sleep only skips the night, this mod turns your bed into a vital recovery tool, allowing you to heal wounds while you rest ⚔️.

### **Key Features:**

❤️ **Restorative Sleep:** Gradually regenerates your health points while you are tucked in bed.


🍦 **Vanilla+ Friendly:** No clunky menus or extra items—just a natural extension of existing mechanics.


🚀 **Performance First:** Optimized implementation to ensure minimal impact on server performance.


🧩 High Compatibility: Designed to work perfectly alongside other survival-focused mods.

### How it works:
By hooking into the player's sleep state, the mod safely applies healing effects without interfering with other gameplay loops. It’s the perfect addition to any modpack that values immersive survival 🏡.
